---
title: "get_settled_markets"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_settled_markets()`

Get Settled Markets

## Usage

```r
get_settled_markets(
  series_ticker = NULL,
  event_ticker = NULL,
  from = NULL,
  to = NULL,
  limit = 200,
  max_pages = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `series_ticker` | Character. Filter by series ticker. |
| `event_ticker` | Character. Filter by event ticker. |
| `from` | Date, character, or integer. Start of date range. Accepts "2026-01-01", as.Date(), or Unix seconds. |
| `to` | Date, character, or integer. End of date range. Accepts "2026-02-07", as.Date(), or Unix seconds. |
| `limit` | Integer. Results per page (1-1000). Defaults to 200. |
| `max_pages` | Integer. Maximum pages to fetch. NULL for all. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with settled market information including results.

## Description

Retrieves settled markets with optional date filtering. Useful for
analyzing historical outcomes.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
# Get all settled markets for a series
results <- get_settled_markets(series_ticker = "KXHIGHNY")

# Get markets settled in a date range
results <- get_settled_markets(
  series_ticker = "KXHIGHNY",
  from = "2026-01-01",
  to = "2026-02-01"
)

# Get markets settled in the last 7 days
results <- get_settled_markets(from = Sys.Date() - 7)

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other history: 
`get_event_candlesticks()`,
`get_event_results()`,
`get_market_history()`,
`get_series_history()`,
`get_settled_events()`,
`get_trade_history()`
